commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_inactive into OBDF_INACTIVE
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_inactive into OBDF_INACTIVE

Change the use of the odb_inactive bitfield into a bit in
the ofd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.
